author: smimz
content: Hey <@372731338031366165> <@172932172657721344> <@194432762315407360> , apologies could not join the call yesterday to discuss the RPC error codes, I listened to the recording & happy to jump on a separate call to make progress or we could start a thread here, please let me know

author: smimz
content: The non standard errors are the ones defined in the [eip-1474](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-1474.md), but i do think we could define these codes properly in its own category

author: sambhavjain6766
content:
hello <@259648573401071617> <@194432762315407360>  in execution apis https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/fd3ddbf38d16f4d2a2af12839128db25a018bce5/src/error-groups/rpc-non-standard-errors.yaml#L9 -32003 is for **transaction rejected** & https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/fd3ddbf38d16f4d2a2af12839128db25a018bce5/src/error-groups/rpc-non-standard-errors.yaml#L3 -32000 is for invalid input but in **eth_call for errors like OOG we get error code as -32000 instead **

 In geth -32003 is mentioned for https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/blob/cb387c9bc32dddad0530be795f80f0744be8a927/rpc/errors.go#L63 err response too large

author: s1na
content: Yes so there are conflicting error codes in some places now. -32000 is a general error code which doesn't indicate much in itself
